reviews.comment:
Los empleados son muy atentos. Por lo demás, ya se sabe que la nafta de YPF es buena pero cara.
El medidor de aire de los neumáticos funcionaba mal (suoongo que ya lo habrán arreglado... yo estuve a fines de enero)

(Translated by Google)
The employees are very attentive. Otherwise, it's well known that YPF gasoline is good but expensive.
The tire pressure gauge was malfunctioning (I suppose they've fixed it by now... I was there at the end of January).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNXB2QVF3EAE
